return(function(G,m,g,U,K,B,E,u,w,W,C,P,y,i,S,f,k,a,r,p,M,e,z)w,u,C,W,y,z,p,M,k,P,i,r,S,a,e,f={},function(G,X)local m=k(X)local g=function(...)return r(G,{...},X,m)end return g end,function(G,X)local
